title: Hot Sauce Egg Salad Sandos
summary: A meal prep high-protein breakfast that's genuinely delicious. This spicy egg salad sando is a hell of a way to start the day.

method.description: Bring a saucepan of water to the boil. Gently lower in the eggs, reduce to a simmer, and cook for 6 minutes. Transfer to a bowl of ice water and let them cool fully before peeling.

Meanwhile, thinly slice the chives. Stir the cottage cheese and herbs into a bowl with a drizzle of olive oil. Add the peeled eggs and mash into a creamy, chunky mix. Taste and season with hot sauce and salt to your liking. Box up and place in the fridge until ready to use.
Spoon the egg salad onto a slice of bread, and sandwich together for a fluffy and spicy egg salad sandwich.

tips: Store the egg mixture in an airtight container in the fridge for up to 3 days
Assemble sandwiches fresh for best texture
Cottage Cheese → Cream cheese, Greek yoghurt or mayo
Soft White Bread → Sourdough or wholegrain rolls
Chives → Spring onions, parsley or dill

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
